auth.title: Admin Sign In
auth.noSignup: Access is restricted to administrators. Sign up is not available.

errors.title: Sign-in error
errors.notConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.message: Your account does not have admin permissions.

grill.title: Grill Contest Rivergaro
grill.description: The Rivergaro Grill Contest is one of Italy's most renowned BBQ festivals, with over 40 food trucks, DJ sets and a historic barbecue competition along the Trebbia river.
grill.successMessage: Check your email to complete the payment. (Due to the new domain, check the SPAM folder)

form.name: Full Name
form.noTimes: No times available for this combination.
form.beforeBooking: Before booking, please confirm you have read:
form.consentPayment: The shuttle costs €6 to be paid via PayPal "Goods & Services". The booking is valid only after payment. Cash or on-board payment is not accepted. *
form.consentRefund: Refunds are possible only if the organization cannot provide the service. The organization reserves the right to select passengers at boarding and to change schedules. *
form.consentTerms: I accept the <termsLink>Terms & Conditions</termsLink> and the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> *

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.andataMissing: Select day, stop and time for the outbound trip.
errors.ritornoMissing: Select day and time for the return trip.
errors.returnBeforeDeparture: The return time must be after the departure time.
errors.consentMissing: You must accept all conditions to proceed.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: The data controller is StayUp All Night ("StayUp"), reachable at: info@stayupallnight.it
privacy.s2Body: We collect the following personal data through the shuttle booking form:
privacy.s3Body: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s3L2: Communications about the booked service (confirmation, changes, cancellations)
privacy.s4Body: Processing is based on the consent of the data subject (art. 6, par. 1, lett. a GDPR) and the performance of a contract (art. 6, par. 1, lett. b GDPR).
privacy.s5Body: Personal data will be kept for the time strictly necessary to manage the service, and in any case no more than 12 months from the event date, except for legal obligations.
privacy.s6Body: Pursuant to articles 15-22 of GDPR, the user has the right to:
privacy.s6Contact: To exercise these rights, contact: info@stayupallnight.it
privacy.s7Body: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, loss or destruction.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1B1: The shuttle costs €6 to be sent exclusively via PayPal "Goods & Services" using the link provided in the description or the link sent via email.
terms.s1B2: The shuttle is considered booked only and exclusively after payment.
terms.s1B3: Cash or on-board payment is not accepted.
terms.s2L3: A free beer ticket at the Grill Contest
terms.s3Body: Refunds are possible only if we are unable to provide the service.
terms.s4Body: The organization reserves the right to select passengers at boarding.
terms.s5Body: The organization reserves the right to change schedules based on demand.
